title: Puccinellia retroflexa
taxonomy: Puccinellia retroflexa is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is a part of the genus Puccinellia, which consists of various species of grasses. The genus Puccinellia is further classified under the subfamily Pooideae, and the order Poales. This classification places Puccinellia retroflexa within the larger group of monocots. The plant's classification is based on its botanical characteristics, such as its leaf structure and reproductive organs.
